# German Vocabulary


- **[A1] Die Eltern** (The parents)
  - IPA: ['…õlt…źn]
  - Part of Speech: Noun
  - Gender: Plural
  - Plural: (Same as nominative)
  - Example: "Die Eltern lesen ihren Kindern vor." (The parents read to their children.)

- **[A1] Das Kind** (The child)
  - IPA: [k…™nt]
  - Part of Speech: Noun
  - Gender: Neuter
  - Plural: Die Kinder
  - Example: "Das Kind spielt im Garten." (The child plays in the garden.)

- **[A1] Der Tag** (The day)
  - IPA: [taňźk]
  - Part of Speech: Noun
  - Gender: Masculine
  - Plural: Die Tage

- **[A2] Sprechen** (to speak)

- **[A2] Heute** (today)

- **[A2] Besuchen** (to visit)
